name: Goblin on Low Battery
text:
Goblin on Low Battery's power is equal to your phone's current battery percentage divided by 20, rounded down. (Check now. Yes, now.)
If your phone is below 20%, it enters the battlefield tapped, exhausted, and a little resentful.
Whenever you charge your phone, put a +1/+0 counter on Goblin on Low Battery until it reaches 100%, at which point it overheats and you sacrifice it.
flavorText: He runs on spite and 14% remaining.

extras.impossibleMath: power derived from real-world device state
